svg.title: Scout v6 pipeline node map
svg.desc: Full node flow from triggers through Strategic Discovery, per-opportunity loop, and callback

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Daily 7AM Trigger do in Scout v6?')
sendPrompt('What does the Webhook Trigger accept in Scout v6?')
sendPrompt('What does Route + Build Task v6 do — what payload does it emit?')
g.text: Picks day/week theme · sets strategic_sweep flag

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Strategic Discovery v1 work — what are its inputs, what does it output?')
g.text: 3 Brave searches → Claude → ranked opportunities array
Emits one item per opportunity (currently capped 3–5)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Split Opportunities do — how does the loop work?')
g.text: Loop gate · routes each item OR fires callback when done

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Brave Search v6 do with the search_query from Strategic Discovery?')
g.text: Runs search_query · returns top 5 results + snippets

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Web Fetch + Fallback v6 do?')
g.text: Fetches top 2 URLs · extracts page text

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Scout Brain v6 do — what JSON does it produce?')
g.text: Claude call → structured mission JSON · saves .json file

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Mission Transform + Lifecycle v1 do with the Scout Brain output?')
g.text: Dedup · NEW / UPDATED / SUPPRESSED · writes Missions/

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Log to Supabase v6 write, and what happens if it fails?')
sendPrompt('What does Aidan Callback v6 send — WhatsApp and webhook?')
g.text: WhatsApp summary + outreach draft · Aidan webhook
